name: Still
notes: Relatively still: little motion above the frame background. rel_speed stays low (roughly <= 2x background) -- the block is not moving much relative to the rest of the scene, so residual background drift and parallax (which move the whole frame together) do not by themselves trip it. This is the complement of Flying/Legs and a starting point for marking ground truth; retune the upper rel_speed line on the plot to match where you see genuine stillness end.
